title: SCP-106, The Old Man
description: A rotten humanoid that walks through blocks and will teleport you to its pocket dimension if you're not careful...
body:
The Old Man adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-106 also known as The Old Man or Larry. 


SCP-106 resembles a rotting humanoid, with a wicked smile. It leaves behind a trail of corrosive sludge wherever it walks. If SCP-106 breaches containment, it can appear under the player at any moment, as it has the ability to pass through solid blocks. Upon contact, SCP-106 will drag the player into it's Pocket Dimension, leaving holes in the ground which disappear soon after, but also work as an entrance into it's Pocket Dimension where the victims are left to rot. However there is a way out... You can also recontain the Anomaly or use Tesla Blocks to temporarily neutralize it.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-106 spawn?

SCP-106 only spawns after it is breached. Once this happens, he can randomly appear under a player.

► How can I make SCP-106 breaching?

With a Creative Item you can force SCP-106 to breach if SCP-106 has not yet breached.

Additionally, you can also set the gamerule "doOldManSpawn" to true so that SCP-106 can spawn.

► How can I recontain SCP-106?

SCP-106's Containment Chamber can be found in the world. There you activate the lever of the Femur Breaker and wait a moment. If the message sounds that SCP-106 has been captured, SCP-106 can no longer spawn unless it breaks out again. To avoid this, build your own containment chamber. 

► How can I escape the Pocket Dimension?

There are eight paths in the Pocket Dimension of SCP-106. Seven of them will make you fall and die. But one of them takes you back to the spawn. If you want to escape the Pocket Dimension alive, you have to pay special attention to the floor of the corridors. The texture of the floor of the right exit is different than the other seven.

</details>



![SCP-106](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc0afcdb8fc6a013119c3b24ef4a6cb14aa1c952_0.webp)

SCP-106 is a decayed, humanoid figure that leaves a trail of corrosive slime under it. It only spawns after a containment breach, emerging beneath players. While SCP-106 is slow, it can phase through solid blocks except magnetized blocks, making escape and capture incredibly difficult. If SCP-106 attacks you, it can drag you into its Pocket Dimension, a twisted labyrinth with eight paths, only one of which leads back to safety. Choosing the wrong path will kill you. SCP-106 leaves holes after despawning or attacking, which works like an entrance into the Pocket Dimension. SCP-106 is highly dangerous, and it's abilities makes it very hard to contain, however, there is a way to contain this Anomaly...

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
